MIGHT.description: The Gravity Well. Governing tension and force. Resource: STAMINA.

OFFENSE.name: Kinetic Punch
OFFENSE.effect: Melee Attack. On a Hit, you may push the target 10ft in any direction.

DEFENSE.name: Anchor
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when Pushed/Knocked Prone. You ignore the effect and gain +2 Defense vs the next attack.

UTILITY.name: The Pull
UTILITY.effect: Action. Target one loose object (Size Small/Med) within 30ft. Pull it instantly to your hand.

OFFENSE.name: Crush
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Deals normal dmg. If Target is Prone, deal +1d6 Structural Dmg (Meat) and pin them (0 Move).

DEFENSE.name: Orbital Shield
DEFENSE.effect: Action (Sustain). Loose debris floats around you. Grants +2 Defense (DB) against Ranged Attacks.

UTILITY.name: Heavy Step
UTILITY.effect: Action. Increase gravity in a 10ft zone. Area becomes Difficult Terrain (Half Move) for enemies.

OFFENSE.name: Impact Driver
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Charge up. Next Melee Hit releases a shockwave. Primary target takes Weapon Dmg, adjacent enemies take 1d6 Force Dmg.

DEFENSE.name: Repulsion Blast
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when Hit. Blast everything within 5ft back 10ft.

UTILITY.name: Levitate
UTILITY.effect: Action. Target Self or Ally. Gain Fly Speed (20ft) for 1 turn.

OFFENSE.name: Singularity Point
OFFENSE.effect: Action. 15ft radius. All enemies are pulled to the center and take 2d8 Force Dmg. Reflex Save for half.

DEFENSE.name: Event Horizon
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when targeted by a projectile. The projectile halts in mid-air and falls harmlessly.

UTILITY.name: Zero-G Zone
UTILITY.effect: Action. 20ft Cube. Gravity is disabled. Movement requires pushing off surfaces.

OFFENSE.name: Meteor Drop
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Telekinetically rip a boulder or chunk of earth from the ground and crush a 10ft area. 4d6 Bludgeoning.

DEFENSE.name: Absolute Mass
DEFENSE.effect: Passive (Sustain). You cannot be moved by any force, magical or physical, and you gain +4 Defense against AOE effects.

UTILITY.name: Gravitic Lock
UTILITY.effect: Action. Pin an enemy or object to a wall or floor. Strength Save to break free. If failed, speed is 0.

OFFENSE.name: Implode
OFFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Target one entity. Force their internal gravity to collapse. Instantly inflict a Severe Internal Injury.

DEFENSE.name: Repel Reality
DEFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Create a 30ft dome. No enemy, projectile, or magic can pass exactly through the barrier for 1 minute.

UTILITY.name: Warp Fold
UTILITY.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Fold space. Teleport yourself and up to 3 willing allies perfectly up to 100ft to a space you can see.

ENDURANCE.description: The Immovable Object. Governing density and weight. Resource: STAMINA.

OFFENSE.name: Heavy Hand
OFFENSE.effect: Passive. Your unarmed strikes count as 'Maces' (Stamina Dmg) and deal 1d6 Dmg.

DEFENSE.name: Iron Skin
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when Grazed. Reduce Composure Damage to 0.

UTILITY.name: Density Shift
UTILITY.effect: Free Action. Double your weight. Advantage on Shove/Grapple checks.

OFFENSE.name: Wrecking Ball
OFFENSE.effect: Move Action. Move in a straight line. You can move through enemies. Dealing 1d8 Bludgeoning to anyone you touch.

DEFENSE.name: Momentum Eater
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when taking Meat Dmg. Reduce damage by your Endurance Score.

UTILITY.name: Anchor Point
UTILITY.effect: Action. You become an immovable cover object. Allies behind you get +4 Defense.

OFFENSE.name: Quake
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Stomp. All enemies within 10ft must pass Endurance Save or fall Prone.

DEFENSE.name: Statue Form
DEFENSE.effect: Action. You turn to stone until start of next turn. Immune to all Physical Damage, but you cannot Move/Act.

UTILITY.name: Burden
UTILITY.effect: Action. Touch enemy. Their armor Holding Fee doubles for 1 minute.

OFFENSE.name: Earth Shatter
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Strike the ground in a 15ft cone. Turns entire area to Difficult Terrain and deals 2d6 Bludgeoning.

DEFENSE.name: Diamond Skin
DEFENSE.effect: Passive (Sustain). You gain Damage Resistance to Slashing, Piercing, and Bludgeoning.

UTILITY.name: Tectonic Shift
UTILITY.effect: Action. Raise or lower a 10x10ft section of earth by up to 10ft, creating permanent cover or a pit.

OFFENSE.name: Crushing Grasp
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Grapple a target. If successful, automatically deal 2d8 Bludgeoning damage as you crush them.

DEFENSE.name: Juggernaut
DEFENSE.effect: Passive. When you take the Sprint action, you destroy any destructible terrain (doors, thin walls) in your path automatically.

UTILITY.name: Lead Legs
UTILITY.effect: Action. Target loses 20ft of movement speed and cannot jump or fly for 1 minute.

OFFENSE.name: Fissure
OFFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Tear the earth open in a 60ft line. Enemies fall into the chasm, taking 6d6 damage and are trapped.

DEFENSE.name: Avatar of Stone
DEFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Grow one size category. Max HP doubles temporarily. Unarmed damage triples. Lasts 1 minute.

UTILITY.name: Ossify
UTILITY.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Touch a non-magical object up to the size of a carriage. It permanently turns to solid, indestructible adamantine.

REFLEXES.description: The Kinetic Heartbeat. Governing velocity and tempo. Resource: STAMINA.

OFFENSE.name: Sonic Jab
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. High speed. If you miss, you may immediately make a second attack at Disadvantage.

DEFENSE.name: Twitch
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when Hit by Ranged Attack. Reduce Dmg by 1d10 + Reflex.

UTILITY.name: Quick Step
UTILITY.effect: Bonus Action. Move 5ft. Does not provoke Opportunity Attacks.

OFFENSE.name: Momentum Strike
OFFENSE.effect: Passive. For every 10ft you move before attacking, add +1 Damage.

DEFENSE.name: Blur
DEFENSE.effect: Action. You vibrate. Defense Rolls vs you have Disadvantage until you get hit.

UTILITY.name: Wall Run
UTILITY.effect: You can traverse vertical surfaces during your Move action without falling.

OFFENSE.name: Flurry
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Make two Light Weapon attacks against one target.

DEFENSE.name: Evasion
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when you fail a Reflex Save (AoE). You take 0 damage instead of half.

UTILITY.name: Haste
UTILITY.effect: Action. Touch Ally. They gain +10ft Speed and +1 Defense for 2 rounds.

OFFENSE.name: Lightning Strike
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Instantly close the distance to a target within 30ft and automatically score a hit (No attack roll required, roll normal damage).

DEFENSE.name: Afterimage
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when targeted. You instantly teleport 10ft away, leaving an illusion that absorbs the hit.

UTILITY.name: Wind Runner
UTILITY.effect: Passive. You ignore Difficult Terrain completely, and can run across the surface of water.

OFFENSE.name: Whirlwind
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Make a melee attack against every enemy within your reach simultaneously.

DEFENSE.name: Vibrate Through
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when grappled or restrained by any physical or magical means. You instantly phase through the bonds.

UTILITY.name: Time Dilation
UTILITY.effect: Action. Everything within 20ft of you moves in slow motion. Enemies inside the zone have half speed and -2 Defense.

OFFENSE.name: Thousand Cuts
OFFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Pick one target in Line of Sight. Teleport to them, strike them 10 times instantly (Sum total 10d6 damage), and teleport back.

DEFENSE.name: Velocity Master
DEFENSE.effect: Passive (1/Cycle toggle). Increase your actions per turn by +1. Lasts for 3 rounds.

UTILITY.name: Frictionless
UTILITY.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Remove all friction from a 50x50ft area. Anything moving inside continues sliding endlessly until hitting a wall.

FINESSE.description: The Shifting State. Governing phase and flow. Resource: STAMINA.

OFFENSE.name: Seep
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Ignore Shield/Cover bonuses. The weapon flows around the block.

DEFENSE.name: Soft Form
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when Grappled/Restrained. Automatically escape.

UTILITY.name: Liquid Step
UTILITY.effect: Passive. Ignore Difficult Terrain penalties (Water, Mud, Ice).

OFFENSE.name: Spike
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Turn a limb into a weapon (1d8 Pierce). Lasts for encounter.

DEFENSE.name: Disperse
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when Hit. Turn into mist briefly. Take Half Damage.

UTILITY.name: Mimic
UTILITY.effect: Action. Alter your face/height to match a humanoid you can see.

OFFENSE.name: Internal Strike
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Phase hand into target. Deal direct Meat Damage (Bypass Armor DB).

DEFENSE.name: Displacement
DEFENSE.effect: Action. You appear 2ft to the left. First attack against you this round automatically Misses.

UTILITY.name: Meld
UTILITY.effect: Action. Step into a stone/tree wall. You are hidden inside it. (Stealth +10).

OFFENSE.name: Corrode
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Touch target's weapon or armor. It permanently loses 1 Durability. If Durability is 0, it dissolves.

DEFENSE.name: Amorphous Flesh
DEFENSE.effect: Passive. You have Advantage on resisting any piercing or bludgeoning attacks as your organs shift away from blows.

UTILITY.name: Puddle Form
UTILITY.effect: Action. Dissolve into a flat pool of liquid. You can move through grates, under doors, and are totally silent.

OFFENSE.name: Blood Boil
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Target an enemy's fluids within 30ft. They must pass Fortitude Save or take 3d8 damage and become Staggered.

DEFENSE.name: Phase Shift
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when caught in a massive AoE. Completely phase out of reality for 1 round, avoiding all damage.

UTILITY.name: Doppelganger
UTILITY.effect: Action. Perfect Mimicry. Copy a target's appearance, voice, and biometric traits flawlessly. Indistinguishable from the real thing.

OFFENSE.name: Molecular Deconstruction
OFFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Touch an enemy. They must pass a massive Fortitude save. On fail, they dissolve into liquid mist and instantly die.

DEFENSE.name: Absolute Null
DEFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Become completely incorporeal for 1 encounter. Cannot deal physical damage or take physical damage.

UTILITY.name: State Cascade
UTILITY.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Instantly turn a 100x100ft area of solid stone/earth into quicksand, or freeze an entire lake instantly.

VITALITY.description: The Living Spark. Governing biology and growth. Resource: STAMINA.

OFFENSE.name: Thorn Whip
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Reach 10ft. Pulls target 5ft closer on Hit.

DEFENSE.name: Barkskin
DEFENSE.effect: Action. Gain +1 Natural Armor DB for 1 hour.

UTILITY.name: Mend
UTILITY.effect: Action. Touch. Heal 1d4 Composure (Stabilize nerves).

OFFENSE.name: Toxic Spore
OFFENSE.effect: Action. 5ft Cone. Poison Status (-2 Stamina/Turn).

DEFENSE.name: Root
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when Pushed. Vines hold you in place. You cannot be moved.

UTILITY.name: Stim
UTILITY.effect: Bonus Action. Inject adrenaline. Regain 1d6 Stamina immediately.

OFFENSE.name: Overgrowth
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Vines erupt in 15ft area. Enemies are Restrained (Str Save).

DEFENSE.name: Rapid Regen
DEFENSE.effect: Action (Sustain). Regain 1 HP (Meat) at the start of your turn for 3 turns.

UTILITY.name: Pheromones
UTILITY.effect: Action. Beasts/Animals will not attack you unless provoked.

OFFENSE.name: Noxious Cloud
OFFENSE.effect: Action. 20ft radius cloud of spores. Enemies inside are Blinded and Poisoned.

DEFENSE.name: Ironwood Carapace
DEFENSE.effect: Action. +3 Natural Defense, and any enemy striking you in melee takes 1d4 piercing damage.

UTILITY.name: Commune with Nature
UTILITY.effect: Action. Speak directly with the flora/fauna of the area to gain detailed info about enemy movements.

OFFENSE.name: Parasite
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Plant a seed in target. Target takes 1d8 ongoing bleeding damage. When target dies, a friendly Myconid spawns.

DEFENSE.name: Photosynthesis
DEFENSE.effect: Passive. While in direct sunlight, regenerate 1 Stamina every turn and heal 1 HP per minute.

UTILITY.name: Accelerate Growth
UTILITY.effect: Action. Turn seeds into a full-grown tree wall, or cause crops to ripen instantly over an expansive field.

OFFENSE.name: Chimera Plague
OFFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Release a hyper-virus in a 100ft area. Enemies rapidly mutate, taking heavy damage and attacking closest target blindly.

DEFENSE.name: Rebirth
DEFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). If you drop to 0 HP, instantly be absorbed into the earth and respawn 1d4 rounds later at full health nearby.

UTILITY.name: Forest's Breath
UTILITY.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Bring a dead ecosystem back to life, curing all disease/curses in a massive radius and restoring fertility to the land.

FORTITUDE.description: The Unbending Rule. Governing law and immunity. Resource: STAMINA.

OFFENSE.name: Smite
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. If you hit an enemy who damaged you last turn, deal +1d6 Dmg.

DEFENSE.name: Deny
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when a Status Effect is applied. Roll Save with Advantage.

UTILITY.name: Truth
UTILITY.effect: Action. Target cannot lie for 1 minute (Will Save).

OFFENSE.name: Inevitable
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Mark a Target. You ignore all Cover/Concealment against them.

DEFENSE.name: Unyielding
DEFENSE.effect: Passive. You cannot be Critically Hit. All Crits count as Normal Hits.

UTILITY.name: Zone of Law
UTILITY.effect: Action. 10ft Zone. No Dash/Sprint actions allowed inside.

OFFENSE.name: Execution
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. If Target is below 10 HP, this attack deals Double Damage.

DEFENSE.name: Nullify
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when targeted by Magic. Roll Fortitude vs Caster. On success, the spell fizzes.

UTILITY.name: Oath
UTILITY.effect: Action. Ally swears an Oath to kill a target. They get +2 To Hit that target. If they fail to kill it, they lose Composure.

OFFENSE.name: Guilt
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Range 30ft. Target takes psychic damage equal to the total Meat HP damage they have dealt in this combat.

DEFENSE.name: Absolute Edict
DEFENSE.effect: Action. Point to an enemy. They are completely forbidden from using a specific type of attack (e.g. Magic, Ranged) for 3 rounds.

UTILITY.name: Binding Contract
UTILITY.effect: Action. Create a glowing contract. If the signer breaks the agreement, their Vitality permanently drops to 1.

OFFENSE.name: Judgement
OFFENSE.effect: Action. 30ft Radius. All enemies who have dealt damage to an ally must pass Fortitude save or take 3d8 Radiant damage and fall Prone.

DEFENSE.name: Sanctuary Field
DEFENSE.effect: Action (Sustain). 15ft Aura. No creature inside can take damage, but no creature inside can deal damage either.

UTILITY.name: Exile
UTILITY.effect: Action. Touch target. They are physically barred from ever entering the current city, structure, or biome again.

OFFENSE.name: Final Verdict
OFFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Erase a target from existence. Target must pass massive Fort Save. On fail, they turn to ash instantly. On success, completely drained of Stamina/Focus.

DEFENSE.name: Aegis Imperium
DEFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Party immune to ALL negative status effects and non-magical weapon damage for 1 encounter.

UTILITY.name: Rewrite Reality
UTILITY.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Declare one absolute rule for the entire battlefield (e.g. 'Fire cannot burn', 'Swords cannot sever'). The law holds unbroken for 1 hour.

KNOWLEDGE.description: The Calculated Mind. Psionics & Analysis. Resource: FOCUS.

OFFENSE.name: Telekinetic Shove
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Ranged (30ft). Deal 1d4 Force Dmg and push target 5ft.

DEFENSE.name: Predict
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when Attacked. GM must tell you exact Attack Roll. You choose to use Shield/Dodge after knowing.

UTILITY.name: Scan
UTILITY.effect: Action. Learn one stat (HP, Armor, or Attribute) of a target you can see.

OFFENSE.name: Mind Spike
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Mental Dmg. Ignores Armor. Target must make a Logic Save or take 1d8 Dmg.

DEFENSE.name: Calculated Parry
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when Melee Attacked. Use Knowledge stat instead of Armor stat for Defense Roll.

UTILITY.name: Download
UTILITY.effect: Action. Gain Aptitude (Rank 1) in any Skill you don't have for 10 minutes.

OFFENSE.name: Psychic Scream
OFFENSE.effect: Action. 15ft Cone. All enemies take 1d6 Mental Dmg and are Shaken (Disadvantage on Defense).

DEFENSE.name: Mental Fortress
DEFENSE.effect: Passive (Sustain). Immune to Fear, Charm, and Psychic Dmg while sustaining.

UTILITY.name: Hive Link
UTILITY.effect: Action. Link minds with 2 allies. Share Focus points.

OFFENSE.name: Brain Hemorrhage
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. If target failed their last attack, deal 2d8 psychic damage directly to Composure.

DEFENSE.name: Kinetic Bubble
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Catch any number of incoming projectiles in mid-air in a 10ft radius.

UTILITY.name: Translate
UTILITY.effect: Instantly speak, read, and write any language you encounter, living or dead.

OFFENSE.name: Crush Synapses
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Overload the target's brain. Target is paralyzed (0 movement, 0 actions) for 1d4 rounds.

DEFENSE.name: Erase Trajectory
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. You mathematically alter incoming force. Nullify all fall damage or collision damage for the party.

UTILITY.name: Remote Hack
UTILITY.effect: Action. Override any technological/magical console or golem from 100ft away.

OFFENSE.name: Puppet Master
OFFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Completely dominate target mind. You have full control of their body, skills, and speech indefinitely until broken.

DEFENSE.name: Absolute Computation
DEFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). You simulate the entire battle. Gain 3 Guaranteed Natural 20s to use on any roll you wish this combat.

UTILITY.name: Omniscience
UTILITY.effect: Action (1/Cycle). The GM must give you the absolute, unfiltered truth to any 3 questions about the world, plot, or enemies.

LOGIC.description: The Perfect Dance. Geometry & Alchemy. Resource: FOCUS.

OFFENSE.name: Geometric Dart
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Magic Missile. Auto-hits (No Roll). Deals 1d4+1 Force Dmg.

DEFENSE.name: Angle Block
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Add +2 to Defense against a Ranged Attack.

UTILITY.name: Mending
UTILITY.effect: Action. Repair a broken item or heal 1 Armor Point on damaged armor.

OFFENSE.name: Perfect Cut
OFFENSE.effect: Attack (Melee). Treat weapon's damage die as maximum value (e.g., d8 -> 8). Do not roll dmg.

DEFENSE.name: Mirror Shield
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. If a Spell targets you and misses, reflect it back at caster.

UTILITY.name: Rearrange
UTILITY.effect: Action. Swap positions of two willing allies (or objects) in 30ft.

OFFENSE.name: Elemental Shape
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Create a 10ft Cube of Fire or Ice. Enemies inside take 2d6 Dmg.

DEFENSE.name: Stasis Cube
DEFENSE.effect: Action. Encase self or target in force field. Invulnerable, but cannot act. 1 round.

UTILITY.name: Bridge
UTILITY.effect: Action. Create solid bridge of hard-light/force across 20ft gap. 1 min.

OFFENSE.name: Shatter Concept
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Deal 2d8 Force Dmg that bypasses all magical wards or elemental resistances.

DEFENSE.name: Paradox Form
DEFENSE.effect: Passive. Ranged attacks targeting you have a 50% chance to immediately teleport harmlessly behind you.

UTILITY.name: Alchemical Transmutation
UTILITY.effect: Action. Turn 1 pound of base material (lead, iron) into gold, or turn pure water to acid.

OFFENSE.name: Tesseract
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Trap an enemy in a 4-dimensional box. They take 3d6 Force Dmg every turn and are removed from play until they save.

DEFENSE.name: Symmetry
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. When taking damage, instantly redirect 50% of the damage taken precisely back to the attacker.

UTILITY.name: Construct Golem
UTILITY.effect: Action. Build a permanent automated Clockwork construct from available scrap that takes basic commands.

OFFENSE.name: Divide By Zero
OFFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Target is completely erased from space-time. Enemies surrounding them take devastating 6d10 explosion of raw logic logic.

DEFENSE.name: God's Algorithm
DEFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Automatically neutralize all active magic, traps, and buffs in a 200ft radius. Returns battle to zero state.

UTILITY.name: Spatial Fold
UTILITY.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Link two distant doors across the globe permanently via a portal. Anyone can step between cities instantly.

AWARENESS.description: The Infinite Sight. Light & Perception. Resource: FOCUS.

OFFENSE.name: Flash
OFFENSE.effect: Action. 10ft Burst. Enemies Reflex Save or Blinded for 1 turn.

DEFENSE.name: Refract
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when targeted. Appear 2ft to left. Attack misses on even die roll.

UTILITY.name: Illuminate
UTILITY.effect: Free Action. Object glows like torch for 1 hour. Can adhere to enemies.

OFFENSE.name: Searing Beam
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Line 30ft. Deals 1d8 Radiant Dmg.

DEFENSE.name: Invisibility
DEFENSE.effect: Action. Invisible until you attack/take damage.

UTILITY.name: Scry
UTILITY.effect: Action. See through closed door/wall (3ft thick) for 1 round.

OFFENSE.name: Laser Grid
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Create wall of light. Passing through deals 2d6 Radiant Dmg.

DEFENSE.name: Hologram
DEFENSE.effect: Action. Create duplicate. Enemy needs Awareness check to differentiate.

UTILITY.name: Reveal Truth
UTILITY.effect: Action. Dispel Illusions, Invisibility, Shapeshifting in 30ft.

OFFENSE.name: Corona
OFFENSE.effect: Action. You become a small sun. Enemies within 20ft take 2d6 Radiant Dmg automatically and suffer Disadvantage to attack.

DEFENSE.name: Mirage Field
DEFENSE.effect: Action (Sustain). The entire party appears to be 15ft away from their actual location.

UTILITY.name: Clairvoyance
UTILITY.effect: Action. Place a permanent, invisible, scrying eye anywhere in the world. See through it from any distance.

OFFENSE.name: Sun Lance
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Range 100ft. Fire a focused beam from orbit. Hits automatically for 4d10 Radiant Dmg, bypassing all roofs.

DEFENSE.name: Bend Light
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. You literally bend line of sight. Ranged attacks meant for you curve and hit a completely different target.

UTILITY.name: Astral Projection
UTILITY.effect: Action. Leave your body entirely. Roam the physical/ethereal planes infinitely at light speed.

OFFENSE.name: Supernova
OFFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Detonate. Massive 100ft explosion dealing 8d8 Radiant Dmg. You also drop to 1 HP.

DEFENSE.name: Absolute Obfuscation
DEFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). The entire party becomes permanently wiped from the memories and sensors of the enemy faction.

UTILITY.name: True Sight
UTILITY.effect: Passive (1/Cycle toggle). See into the GM's notes. You know exactly what a boss's HP, weak points, and next moves are.

INTUITION.description: The Precursor Vibe. Luck & Probability. Resource: FOCUS.

OFFENSE.name: Jinx
OFFENSE.effect: Reaction. Enemy must reroll an Attack die and take the lower result.

DEFENSE.name: Bad Feeling
DEFENSE.effect: Passive. You cannot be Surprised. Sequence +5.

UTILITY.name: Find Path
UTILITY.effect: Action. GM indicates 'correct' direction to objective.

OFFENSE.name: Ricochet
OFFENSE.effect: Passive. If Ranged Attack misses, reroll it against different target in 10ft.

DEFENSE.name: Dumb Luck
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when failing a Save. Reroll it.

UTILITY.name: Gamble
UTILITY.effect: Action. Roll 1d6. 1: Lose 2 Focus. 2-5: Regain 2 Stamina. 6: Regain all Focus.

OFFENSE.name: Calamity
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Rube Goldberg accident. Environment object drops for 3d6 Dmg.

DEFENSE.name: Fated Miss
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when Critted. Turn Critical Hit into a Miss.

UTILITY.name: Glitch
UTILITY.effect: Action. Force door to open, trap to fail, or guard sneeze. Reality bends.

OFFENSE.name: Butterfly Effect
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Drop a pebble or tap a wall. Three rounds later, an enemy takes 4d8 Unavoidable Force Dmg as reality violently corrects.

DEFENSE.name: Loaded Dice
DEFENSE.effect: Passive. At the start of combat, roll 3d20. You may replace any dice roll made by you or the GM with one of those results.

UTILITY.name: Safe Bet
UTILITY.effect: Action. GM tells you exactly what would happen if you do a specific action, before you actually do it.

OFFENSE.name: Bad Moon
OFFENSE.effect: Action. All enemies in 60ft automatically roll Natural 1s on their next Attack Check.

DEFENSE.name: Probability Shield
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. You have a 75% chance (roll 1d4, fail on 1) to take exactly 0 damage from any source.

UTILITY.name: Fortress of Luck
UTILITY.effect: Action. Bless an area. For 1 hour, allies automatically succeed on all Skill Checks.

OFFENSE.name: Russian Roulette
OFFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Flip a coin. Heads: Every enemy in the encounter instantly dies. Tails: You drop to 0 HP.

DEFENSE.name: Save State
DEFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Create a checkpoint. At any point in the next hour, snap the entire party back to this spot, with their HP and resources reset.

UTILITY.name: Reweave Fate
UTILITY.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Completely undo the results of the last 1 minute of gameplay. The GM un-kills PCs, un-burns towns, etc. You play the minute over.

CHARM.description: The Radiant Resonance. Command & Emotion. Resource: FOCUS.

OFFENSE.name: Shout
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Cone 15ft. Enemies save or drop held items.

DEFENSE.name: Distract
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Enemy targeting you targets adjacent ally (or nothing) instead.

UTILITY.name: Command: Halt
UTILITY.effect: Action. Target stops moving for 1 turn (Will Save).

OFFENSE.name: Awe Strike
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Psychic Dmg. Target is Charmed (Cannot attack you) until taking Dmg.

DEFENSE.name: Peace Field
DEFENSE.effect: Action. No hostility in 10ft. Attackers take 1d6 Psychic.

UTILITY.name: Rally
UTILITY.effect: Action. Heal 1d4 Composure in 30ft, remove 'Shaken'.

OFFENSE.name: Dominate
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Control an enemy's next Action (Make them attack friend).

DEFENSE.name: Sanctuary
DEFENSE.effect: Action. Enemies pass Charisma Check to target you, or lose action.

UTILITY.name: Inspire
UTILITY.effect: Action. Ally's next d20 roll is guaranteed 20.

OFFENSE.name: Words of Ruin
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Speak a devastating insult. Target loses all Composure instantly and is paralyzed with grief.

DEFENSE.name: Martyr's Glow
DEFENSE.effect: Passive. Any enemy striking you physically begins to weep and cannot attack you again for 1 hour.

UTILITY.name: Mass Suggestion
UTILITY.effect: Action. Convince up to 10 entities that a specific lie is the absolute truth for 24 hours.

OFFENSE.name: Siren Song
OFFENSE.effect: Action. All enemies in 60ft drop their weapons and walk slowly toward you, unable to react or defend themselves.

DEFENSE.name: Unbreakable Bond
DEFENSE.effect: Passive. Your party shares one giant HP pool. Damage cannot kill someone unless the entire shared pool is emptied.

UTILITY.name: Cult of Personality
UTILITY.effect: Action. Convert an entire village or hostile camp into zealots who will gladly fight and die for you.

OFFENSE.name: Heart Attack
OFFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Command a single, massive target to simply 'Die'. If they fail an impossible Will Save, their heart stops.

DEFENSE.name: Apotheosis
DEFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). You become an angelic figure. All surviving enemies immediately surrender and beg for your mercy.

UTILITY.name: Rewrite Identity
UTILITY.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Completely rewrite the memories, personality, and alignments of a massive Boss or key Political Leader permanently.

WILLPOWER.description: The Persistent Zeal. Spirit & Necromancy. Resource: FOCUS.

OFFENSE.name: Spirit Lash
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Reach 15ft. Spectral whip. 1d6 Necrotic Dmg + Pull 5ft.

DEFENSE.name: Ward
DEFENSE.effect: Action. Gain +2 Defense vs Undead or Spirits.

UTILITY.name: Speak with Dead
UTILITY.effect: Action. Ask 1 question to a corpse. Must answer truthfully.

OFFENSE.name: Ghost Blade
OFFENSE.effect: Bonus Action. Summon spectral weapon to fight alongside you (1d6) for 1 min.

DEFENSE.name: Refuse Death
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. Trigger when dropping to 0 HP. Drop to 1 HP instead.

UTILITY.name: Tether
UTILITY.effect: Action. Link life to ally. You can take their dmg instead.

OFFENSE.name: Soul Blast
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Ranged. 2d8 Necrotic Dmg. Heal HP equal to half dmg.

DEFENSE.name: Ethereal Form
DEFENSE.effect: Action. Become ghost. Move through walls. Immune to physical dmg for 1 turn.

UTILITY.name: Poltergeist
UTILITY.effect: Action. Telekinetically lift and throw 3 objects simultaneously.

OFFENSE.name: Animate Dead
OFFENSE.effect: Action. Resurrect up to 3 fallen enemies as zombies to fight for you for the duration of the encounter.

DEFENSE.name: Soul Cage
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction. When an enemy dies, trap their soul. Heal yourself to Full HP and Stamina instantly.

UTILITY.name: Seance
UTILITY.effect: Action. Summon the ghost of a long-dead hero or scholar to answer complex historical or magical inquiries.

OFFENSE.name: Grip of Death
OFFENSE.effect: Attack. Touch target. Deal 4d8 Necrotic damage. Target's Max HP drops by the amount cleanly.

DEFENSE.name: Lich's Phylactery
DEFENSE.effect: Passive. As long as you have any FOCUS points remaining, you cannot physically be killed. Damage stops at 1 HP.

UTILITY.name: Haunt
UTILITY.effect: Action. Send an angry spirit to curse an enemy camp. Enemies are constantly terrified and cannot gain the benefits of a Rest Cycle.

OFFENSE.name: Army of the Damned
OFFENSE.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Raise every single corpse within a 1-mile radius to swarm a battlefield as your personal army.

DEFENSE.name: Cheat the Reaper
DEFENSE.effect: Reaction (1/Cycle). When taking damage that would wipe the entire party (TPK), reject reality. Entire party heals to 100%.

UTILITY.name: True Resurrection
UTILITY.effect: Action (1/Cycle). Bring a completely destroyed, disintegrated, or long-dead character back to perfect, unstained life.
